```okin
2<X, 3>;112<83<X, 10>|192~WRITELN<"X is greater">>  -- prints "X is greater" (3 > 10)
```

```okin
2<STR, "Hello, World!">;2<IDX, 0>;208~LEN<STR, IDX>;192~WRITELN<IDX>   -- prints 13
```

```okin
2<ARR, 48<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>;2<FOUND, 49<2, ARR>>             -- prints (1 in ARR)
```
